programme.title: Australian Grand Prix Day 2
programme.desc: Follow all the action from Day 2 as the Australian GP continues.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: Anticipation builds ahead of the first lights out of the season when the second practice session gets underway.

programme.title: Melbourne SuperSprint
programme.desc: The Supercars hit the Albert Park streets for Race 5, with championship leader Matt Payne starting on pole.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix Day 2
programme.desc: Follow all the action from Day 2 as the Australian GP continues.

programme.title: Melbourne SuperSprint
programme.desc: Qualifying for Races 6 and 7 begins on Day 3 of action at Melbourne's Albert Park.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: As the third and final practice session gets underway, it’s the last chance for the drivers to get their handle on the Albert Park Circuit ahead of qualifying.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: Pole position is up for grabs as opening qualifying session of the 2026 Formula 1 season gets underway.

programme.title: Melbourne SuperSprint
programme.desc: The Supercars hit the streets of Albert Park for Race 6 as all races of the weekend revert to all-out sprint mode with no compulsory pit stops.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix Day 4
programme.desc: Follow all the action from Day 4 as the Australian GP wraps up.

programme.title: Melbourne SuperSprint
programme.desc: It’s the final day of the Australian Grand Prix as drivers compete for the last points on offer in Melbourne to determine who will claim the Larry Perkins Trophy for the round win.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix Day 4
programme.desc: Follow all the action from Day 4 as the Australian GP wraps up.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: F1’s new era begins at Albert Park. Lando Norris returns to defend his World Championship with McLaren, while the spotlight is also on Lewis Hamilton in his second season with Ferrari.

programme.title: Warriors vs Sydney Roosters
programme.desc: Daly Cherry-Evans heads across the ditch in front of another sell-out crowd in Auckland for his Roosters debut.

programme.title: Cronulla vs Gold Coast Titans
programme.desc: The Titans begin a new era under Josh Hannay. The Sharks have won three straight at home in this rivalry.

programme.title: Manly vs Canberra
programme.desc: Super Saturday winds up with Jamal Fogarty on debut for the hosts against his former club.

programme.title: Gold Coast Suns vs Geelong Cats
programme.desc: The Cats quest for redemption kicks off against the new-look Suns.

programme.title: Greater Western Sydney Giants vs Hawthorn Hawks
programme.desc: The Giants host the Hawks in a massive Opening Round clash at Engie Stadium.

programme.title: St Kilda Saints vs Collingwood Magpies
programme.desc: The Saints host the Pies in a huge Sunday night match at the MCG.

programme.title: Carlton Blues vs Richmond Tigers
programme.desc: The Blues and Tigers face off in Round 1.

programme.title: Essendon Bombers vs Hawthorn Hawks
programme.desc: The Bombers take on the Hawks in Round 1.

programme.title: Western Bulldogs vs Greater Western Sydney Giants
programme.desc: The Bulldogs host the Giants in Round 1.

programme.title: Collingwood Magpies vs Adelaide Crows
programme.desc: The Pies take on the Crows in Round 1.

programme.title: North Melbourne Kangaroos vs Port Adelaide Power
programme.desc: The Roos take on the Power in Round 1.

programme.title: Gold Coast Suns vs West Coast Eagles
programme.desc: The Suns host the Eagles to wrap up Round 1.

programme.title: Brisbane Lions vs Western Bulldogs
programme.desc: Brisbane unfurl their 2025 Premiership Flag before the campaign for a three-peat begins.

programme.title: Geelong Cats vs Fremantle Dockers
programme.desc: The Cats host the Dockers in Round 1.

programme.title: Sydney Swans vs Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: The Swans host the Lions in Round 1.

programme.title: Melbourne Demons vs St Kilda Saints
programme.desc: The Dees host the Saints in Round 1.
